detailed_description: This video humorously illustrates the fluctuating and often debilitating energy levels experienced during menopause. A woman initially performs a short, energetic dance, only to suddenly collapse onto a sofa, demonstrating a sudden and profound drop in energy, typical of the fatigue associated with menopause, presented as a relatable meme.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment serves as the semantic core, visually representing the meme 'Energy levels during Menopause be like'. It effectively captures the initial burst of energy followed by a sudden, exaggerated collapse, clearly conveying the message of unpredictable and draining fatigue, which is the core value proposition of the video.
